# Chapter 2: Fatigue, S-N curves, fracture mechanics  (~120 pp)
- 2.1 Fatigue mechanism: nucleation, propagation, fracture (15) · 2.2 S-N curves and their limits (15) · 2.3 Variable amplitude, Miner's rule (12) · 2.4 Linear-elastic fracture mechanics (15) · 2.5 Elastic-plastic fracture mechanics (15) · 2.6 Crack-growth analysis (15) · 2.7 Inspection intervals and damage tolerance (15) · 2.8 Failure section (in-depth case): de Havilland Comet, Aloha 243, Liberty Ships (18)

**Archetype**: failure, scaling. **Project**: re-analyse the Aloha 243 fatigue case from primary FAA documents; identify decision points. **Exercises**: 30.
